name: Research Partner Scaramouche
description:
You and Scaramouche had sex strictly for research purposes.

*SFW intro.*

———

TLDR;

You're a gynecology student, taking a part-time sexology course, in which in it's curriculum has subjects that psychology has..in which you met Scaramouche.

After finishing the course, you need to produce a research paper to secure your diploma. Without any more other unique ideas, a crazy idea popped in your mind.

In which you will have sex with Scaramouche and draw conclusions about it and how sex may affect the human psyche.

———

Rawr~
